title: Transaction Lifecycle & State Diagram
description: A flowchart illustrating the states a transaction passes through in a Database Management System, from initiation to completion or failure, and the system events that trigger state changes.
relationships: A transaction begins in the Active state. After final statement, it moves to Partially Committed. If commit is successful, it becomes Committed, then Terminated. If it fails at any point, it moves to Failed, then is rolled back to the Aborted state, before finally Terminating.
